name: rapp-zoo
description: Local-first Pokédex for digital organisms. The page itself is a static HTML at /rapp-zoo/. This JSON drives what the page shows in the Starters and Discover tabs without anyone touching the HTML.
notes: featured_starters is a list of rapplication ids from the RAPP_Store v1 catalog that should surface in the rapp-zoo Starters tab. Currently empty — when starter cartridges are promoted, add their ids here and the page picks them up on next load. No HTML change required.
Discover tab pulls the full RAPP_Store catalog from sources.rapp_store and renders one card per rapplication.

The rapp-zoo never holds .egg blobs of its own — every cartridge link points at the RAPP_Store v1 /api/v1/egg/<id>.egg path. One canonical source of truth for cartridge bytes, indirected through this manifest for curation.
